title: Indulgent Malaysian Gruyere Grill
description: A rich and savory Malaysian dish featuring grilled chicken and Gruyere cheese, served with a side of fresh greens and crunchy vegetables.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat.
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, salt, and black pepper.
Add the chicken to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Grill the chicken for 5-6 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
Meanwhile, grill the red bell pepper slices for 3-4 minutes per side, or until tender.
In a large skillet, heat 1 tablespoon of olive oil over medium heat.
Add the snow peas to the skillet and cook for 2-3 minutes, or until tender.
To assemble the dish, place a portion of grilled chicken on a plate, top with shredded Gruyere cheese, and serve with a side of mixed greens, grilled red bell pepper, and snow peas.
